# AstroKalki — Pattern Recognition through Vedic Astrology

AstroKalki is a pattern recognition practice that uses Vedic astrology and depth psychology to decode unconscious patterns running your relationships, emotional choices, and repeating situations.

## Core Offering

**The Same Pain. Different Face. Same Pattern.**

Sessions reveal:
- Karmic relationship loops (why you attract the same person under different names)
- Emotional self-sabotage patterns (the invisible architecture beneath your choices)
- Shadow self projections (the disowned parts of yourself you meet in others)
- Trauma bonding cycles (why you keep returning to painful situations)
- Life direction clarity (seeing what was always there)

## Services & Pricing

| Service | Price (INR) | Duration | Best For |
|---------|-----------|----------|----------|
| Relationship Pattern Analysis | ₹2,499 | 60 min | Understanding repeating relationship patterns |
| Emotional Pattern Decode | ₹2,999 | 60 min | Anxiety loops, avoidance, shame cycles |
| Karmic Relationship Reading | ₹3,499 | 75 min | For people repeating the same relationship |
| Shadow Work Consultation | ₹4,499 | 90 min | Deep Jungian shadow work with chart analysis |
| Life Direction Session | ₹2,999 | 60 min | For people at a crossroads |

## Free Resources

All available at https://astrokalki.com:

- **Pattern Recognition Email Course** — 5-day automated course (free)
- **Interactive Birth Chart Calculator** — Generate your chart instantly
- **Astrological Compatibility Tool** — Check chart alignment with another person
- **Pattern Analyzer** — Identify which emotional pattern is running you
- **Shadow Pattern Quiz** — Discover which disowned part you project onto others
- **Karmic Loop Identifier** — Understand what you came to transcend
- **50+ SEO Articles** — Topics: astrology vs therapy, Saturn return, shadow self, trauma bonds, etc.
- **Audio-Narrated Insights** — Listen to astrology articles instead of reading
- **Pattern Journal** — Track moods, patterns, triggers with AI insights

## How It Works

1. **Get Your Chart** — Provide birth date, time, place (birth certificate or estimate)
2. **Book Session** — Choose service that matches your question
3. **Receive Reading** — 60-90 min Zoom session via video
4. **Get Recording** — Access session recording for 30 days
5. **Integrate** — Receive post-session integration guide and follow-up emails

## The Philosophy

This is not prediction. This is pattern recognition.

Your birth chart is not your destiny — it is your psychological blueprint. It shows the patterns you inherited (family karma), the patterns you chose (soul patterns), and the patterns you keep unconsciously cycling through.

When a pattern is named, it loses its invisible power over you. That is where the shift begins.

**AstroKalki** — Pattern Recognition Practitioner

Trained in:
- Vedic Astrology (Jyotish)
- Depth Psychology (Jungian)
- Trauma-informed practice
- Karmic pattern analysis
